_comment: Minimal Alter Accord envelope. JSON mirror of the normative CBOR/COSE form spelled out in draft-morrison-identity-accord-00 (Alter Accord Implementation Plan §Normative). Both parties sign the canonical serialisation with their Instrument-tier Ed25519 key; signatures are appended in `signatures[]` at handshake time, not stored in this template.

consent_gates.note: The handling of the member share for member-less agent-to-agent flows is still being finalised. Until then this flag is illustrative; production accords must re-validate the consent gates against the live protocol rules.

split.note: 75/5/15/5 = 10000 bps. Agent-to-agent flows with no member re-route the 7500 bps member share once that handling is finalised. Until then, split math is illustrative-only.
